cases.focus: RSS2 emits channel metadata, namespaces, comments links, full content, enclosures, and item hook output
rss_use_excerpt skips content:encoded while retaining description output
empty content feed branch falls back to excerpt inside content:encoded
items without comments or open comment status omit comments/commentRss/slash output
feed loop renders multiple items with per-post categories, GUIDs, authors, dates, and item hooks

side_effect_policy.auto_prepend_stub: rss2-prepend.php supplies deterministic feed-loop functions; copied feed-rss2.php remains the executed template.

rss2:excerpt-option.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- rss_tag_pre:rss2 -->
<rss version="2.0"
	xmlns:content="http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/content/"
	xmlns:wfw="http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/"
	xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/"
	xmlns:atom="http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom"
	xmlns:sy="http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/syndication/"
	xmlns:slash="http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/"
	xmlns:fixture="https://fixture.example/rss2">

<channel>
	<title>Fixture Feed & Title</title>
	<atom:link href="https://example.test/feed/?fixture=rss2" rel="self" type="application/rss+xml" />
	<link>https://example.test</link>
	<description>Fixture feed description</description>
	<lastBuildDate>Sat, 27 Jun 2026 00:00:00 +0000</lastBuildDate>
	<language>en-US</language>
	<sy:updatePeriod>
	daily	</sy:updatePeriod>
	<sy:updateFrequency>
	2	</sy:updateFrequency>
		<fixture:head>yes</fixture:head>
	<item>
		<title>Alpha & Feed</title>
		<link>https://example.test/posts/alpha</link>
					<comments>https://example.test/posts/alpha#comments</comments>
		
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[Fixture Author]]></dc:creator>
		<pubDate>Mon, 01 Jun 2026 01:02:03 +0000</pubDate>
				<category><![CDATA[News & Updates]]></category>
		<category><![CDATA[Haxe <Compiler>]]></category>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">fixture-guid-101</guid>

					<description><![CDATA[Alpha excerpt]]></description>
		
					<wfw:commentRss>https://example.test/posts/alpha/comments/feed</wfw:commentRss>
			<slash:comments>3</slash:comments>
		
				<enclosure url="https://media.example.test/alpha.mp3" length="1234" type="audio/mpeg" />

				<fixture:item marker="101" />
	</item>
	</channel>
</rss>

remaining_gaps.detail: The fixture executes the RSS2 template directly through a local PHP server. do_feed_rss2 routing, query resolution, canonical URL behavior, and browser-observed installed routing remain later gates.

The fixture stubs the post loop, comments, categories, dates, and enclosures. Database-backed WP_Query, comment, taxonomy, media/enclosure, and cache behavior remain covered by other domains or later integration gates.
The fixture compares copied oracle PHP in both roots; generated original-path PHP replacement remains a later cross-domain gate.
